# WEPPY Roblox AI Toolkit

> WEPPY Roblox AI Toolkit is a Roblox Studio AI development product. It includes
> the WEPPY MCP Server for AI app connections and the WEPPY Roblox Studio Plugin
> for live Studio control. Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity can also install
> the optional WEPPY AI Agent Plugin.

## What it does

The WEPPY MCP Server and WEPPY Roblox Studio Plugin provide a real-time bridge
between AI agents and the Roblox Studio DataModel. The server exposes the full Roblox API surface as executable MCP tools,
so AI can directly create, read, modify, and delete instances, scripts, properties,
terrain, and more — inside a live Studio session.

- Action-based MCP tools covering the full Roblox Studio API surface
- Bidirectional project sync between Roblox Studio and local files (Pro)
- Automated playtest: AI starts/stops Play/Run, injects test scripts, collects logs
- UI Studio: AI creates in-game UI that matches your game's style or analyzes existing UI and suggests improvements
- Web dashboard: monitor AI actions, tool history, sync state, changelog, and multi-agent / multi-Studio Connection topology with Studio Targets at `http://localhost:3002`
- Multi-place support (up to 5 places simultaneously)
- Roblox Explorer VSCode extension for browsing Studio hierarchy
- Works with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex CLI, Codex App, Gemini CLI, Antigravity / Antigravity IDE / Antigravity CLI

## Installation

**Install page** (recommended starting point):

https://weppyai.com/en/install

The install page shows the recommended one-line script first.

```bash
# macOS / Linux
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/main/install.sh | bash

# Windows (PowerShell)
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Use the terminal-free web installer on the same page if terminal or PowerShell is uncomfortable.

If automated install fails, use the app-specific manual guides from the docs.

## Optional WEPPY AI Agent Plugin

Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity can additionally install the WEPPY AI Agent Plugin (`weppy-roblox-ai-toolkit`) for client-native setup and workflow guidance. Other supported AI apps connect through the WEPPY MCP Server.

Claude Code:

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp --scope user
claude plugin install weppy-roblox-ai-toolkit@hope1026-roblox-mcp --scope user
```

Codex:

```bash
codex plugin marketplace add hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp
```

After adding the Codex marketplace, restart Codex, open Plugin Directory, and install WEPPY AI Agent Plugin.

Antigravity:

- Antigravity CLI is required to install the WEPPY AI Agent Plugin. The installer uses `agy plugin install` with the latest public GitHub release and verifies it with `agy plugin list`.
- Existing plugins are replaced on every run. Results are installed, updated, reinstalled, repaired, fallback, failed, or skipped; an existing plugin is never treated as a skip.
- The shared MCP fallback is `~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json`. In a CLI-only profile, verified native plugin MCP replaces the shared entry. When Antigravity IDE and CLI coexist, both plugin views stay skill-only and one shared direct `weppy-roblox-mcp` definition serves both.
- Outside the verified OS and version matrix, native discovery uses the MCP fallback. Other MCP servers are preserved.
- On Windows Antigravity, CLI installation has been verified to expose skills and MCP. Windows Antigravity IDE plugin discovery is unverified because the verified environment has no plugin or skills inspection UI, so the shared MCP fallback is preserved.
- Do not pass a GitHub URL directly to `agy plugin install`; the installer downloads the latest public release and installs from a prepared local path.

## Tiers

- Basic (Free): MCP tool execution + one-way Studio -> Local sync
- Pro: Bidirectional sync, UI Studio, bulk actions, terrain generation, spatial analysis, multi-place support for up to 5 places, advanced tools

## Detailed docs

- Install and setup: https://weppyai.com/en/install
- Pro upgrade: https://weppyai.com/plans/

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 18
- Roblox Studio (Windows 10+ or macOS 12+)
- Any MCP-compatible AI client

## Optional

- Roblox Explorer VSCode extension (browse synced instance tree)
- Pro subscription for bidirectional sync, UI Studio, and advanced tools

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@weppy/roblox-mcp
- Roblox Explorer (VS Code Marketplace): https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=weppy.weppy-roblox-explorer
- Roblox Explorer (Open VSX): https://open-vsx.org/extension/weppy/weppy-roblox-explorer
- Issues: https://github.com/hope1026/weppy-roblox-mcp/issues
